chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-343 of 2023 Const. Petition No. S-344 of 2023 Const. Petition No. S-345 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Hearing of case  For hearing of main case 17.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Phull, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Arif Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.3/Landlord Mr. Zia ul Haq Makhdoom, Advocate for Respondent No.4/Tenant Mr. Shahryar Qazi, Additional Advocate General, Sindh *********** Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the case at some length, when confronted with legality of these proceedings submits he would not press these petitions and approach the proper forum according to law. Learned counsel for Respondent Nos.3 and 4 as well as learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh submit that suit filed by the petitioner is pending adjudication, where Arbitrator has been appointed; however, the petitioner is not attending the proceedings even has not filed claim and if he approaches the proper forum including arbitration proceedings before the Arbitrator as per the order passed by the civil court they have no objection for disposal of these petitions. Order accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in the connected petitions. Head of Const. Benches B-K Soomro
